nodes.name: codegraph.mdc
nodes.summary: Cursor editor rule documenting when and how to use the CodeGraph MCP tools for code intelligence in this repository.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-pattern manifest excluding build artifacts, caches, and vendored files from the understand-anything codebase analysis.

nodes.name: benchmark.py
nodes.summary: Runnable benchmark harness that resolves engine/provider selectors, translates sample documents through abersetz, and reports timing and output statistics in a rich table.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses fire for CLI dispatch and unittest.mock.patch to swap in dummy engines for deterministic timing.

nodes.name: get_engine_descriptor
nodes.summary: Resolves an engine selector against the configuration to build a sanitized human-readable descriptor of provider, model, and profile.

nodes.name: resolve_provider_to_engines
nodes.summary: Expands a provider name into the list of matching configured engine selectors.

nodes.name: BenchmarkRunner
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full benchmark run: selecting engines, translating sample files, capturing timings, and rendering and persisting a results summary.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package root that lazily exposes the public API (translate_path, TranslatorOptions, etc.) via module __getattr__ and resolves the package version.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses PEP 562 module-level __getattr__ for lazy imports to keep import time low.

nodes.name: __getattr__
nodes.summary: Module-level lazy attribute resolver that imports public symbols on first access and raises AttributeError otherwise.

nodes.name: __main__.py
nodes.summary: Module execution entry point that delegates to the fast CLI main when the package is run with python -m abersetz.

nodes.name: cli_fast.py
nodes.summary: Lightweight CLI front-end that short-circuits --version without importing the heavy CLI module, otherwise delegating to the full Fire-based CLI.

nodes.name: handle_version
nodes.summary: Detects a --version flag, prints the package version via importlib.metadata, and exits without loading the full CLI.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry function that handles the version fast path then defers to the full CLI main.

nodes.name: anthropic.py
nodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring Anthropic API base URL, API key env var, and known Claude model identifiers.

nodes.name: deepseek.py
nodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring DeepSeek API endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

nodes.name: gemini.py
nodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring Google Gemini's OpenAI-compatible endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

nodes.name: groq.py
nodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring Groq API endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

nodes.name: lmstudio.py
nodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring the local LM Studio OpenAI-compatible endpoint and key settings.

nodes.name: openai.py
nodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring OpenAI API base URL, key env var, and known GPT model identifiers.

nodes.name: openrouter.py
nodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring OpenRouter aggregation endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

nodes.name: siliconflow.py
nodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring SiliconFlow API endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

nodes.name: together.py
nodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring Together AI API endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

nodes.name: local_discovery.py
nodes.summary: Discovers locally installed GGUF/MLX models across LM Studio and other app directories, returning structured LocalModel records.

nodes.name: LocalModel
nodes.summary: Dataclass describing a discovered local model with path, name, app, format, and size.

nodes.name: LocalModelFinder
nodes.summary: Scans known local model directories (resolving LM Studio's pointer file) to enumerate GGUF/MLX models with size metadata.

nodes.name: recommended_settings.json
nodes.summary: Per-provider recommended default settings (model, parameters) for OpenAI, SiliconFlow, Groq, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Gemini, plus a default fallback.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: Pytest fixtures and autouse setup: mocks the bcache decorator with a hashable-args cache, isolates the config dir to tmp_path, and clears caches between tests.

nodes.name: test_chunking.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for text chunking and format detection, including round-trip preservation and a fallback path when the semantic splitter is unavailable.

nodes.name: test_cli.py
nodes.summary: Extensive CLI test suite covering argument wiring, option building, engine/validation entry collection, config commands, and Fire invocation.

nodes.name: test_config.py
nodes.summary: Tests for configuration loading, defaults, and persistence behavior.

nodes.name: test_engine_catalog.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the engine catalog that enumerates and resolves available translation engines.

nodes.name: test_engines.py
nodes.summary: Large test suite exercising translation engine creation, selection normalization, and provider behavior.

nodes.name: test_examples.py
nodes.summary: Functional tests validating that the bundled example scripts (including the benchmark) run end-to-end.

nodes.name: test_htmladapt_twat.py
nodes.summary: Tests for HTML adaptation handling used during translation of markup content.
